entries.canonical_title: The token compiler retrofit pattern (theme-css-config + generate script + two parity tests) is now applied to two apps (brikette, caryina). A codified "retrofit theme compiler" skill could accelerate applying the same pattern to remaining packages (xa-uploader, reception) with lower research overhead. Trigger: second retrofit completed with minimal deviation from brikette pattern.
